title: Pre-arrival services: Who can get services - Canada.ca
content:
## Who can get services
You can get free online services if
- we approved your permanent residence application
- you’re currently outside Canada
- you have 1 of these documents: a letter from us saying you’re eligible for pre-arrival services a confirmation of permanent residence letter a passport request letter that says you’ve been issued a permanent resident visa an information sheet that proves you’ve completed your immigration medical exam a single-entry permanent resident visa a letter from us inviting you to pick up your permanent resident visa
- a letter from us saying you’re eligible for pre-arrival services
- a confirmation of permanent residence letter
- a passport request letter that says you’ve been issued a permanent resident visa
- an information sheet that proves you’ve completed your immigration medical exam
- a single-entry permanent resident visa
- a letter from us inviting you to pick up your permanent resident visa
Pre-arrival services aren’t available if you’re coming to Canada temporarily . This includes visitors, international students and temporary workers with a visa or permit.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
